subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: No, this was on account of all the parts of the universe having a connection and being dependent upon one another. To study the universe, take the body of man
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will
